name: ocp-java-17-notes
description: Personal study notes for the OCP Java SE 17 Developer certification (1Z0-829), rendered as a book with Nextra.

comments.overrides.zod: nextra 4.6.1 strips `children` before validating Layout props against a schema that still requires it; this only works on zod <=4.1.x, where z.custom() tolerates undefined. zod 4.4.x makes z.custom() nonoptional and breaks every page. Remove this pin once Nextra fixes the schema.
